pi_items.source: examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/compose_production_hardening/setup_task.sh (APP_DIR is set to /home/ga/webapp and all scaffolding for app, nginx, and docker-compose.yml is written there)

README.md (goal requires the app to remain accessible at http://localhost:9080) and examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/compose_production_hardening/setup_task.sh (docker-compose.yml exposes port "9080:80" for nginx)
README.md (network isolation goal explicitly names frontend and backend networks as part of the production hardening requirements)
README.md (task overview describes a three-service stack) and examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/compose_production_hardening/setup_task.sh (docker-compose.yml defines nginx, app, and redis services)

privileged_info_summary: The task scaffolds a synthetic Flask/nginx/redis stack entirely under /home/ga/webapp via setup_task.sh, and the Docker Compose scaffold exposes nginx on host port 9080 while demanding frontend/backend network isolation with the nginx, app, and redis services remaining functional.
